summary.en: A strategy framework for analyzing industry structure through rivalry, buyer power, supplier power, threat of entrants, and threat of substitutes, so teams can understand profit pressure before choosing a business-model position.
summary.zh: 一套分析行业结构的战略框架，从现有竞争、买方力量、供应商力量、进入者威胁和替代品威胁理解利润压力，再决定商业模式位置。

sources.label: Michael E. Porter · The Five Competitive Forces That Shape Strategy · Harvard Business Review · 2008
Harvard Business School faculty page · The Five Competitive Forces That Shape Strategy

references.label: Michael E. Porter · The Five Competitive Forces That Shape Strategy · Harvard Business Review

note.en: Authoritative source reaffirming and extending the Five Forces framework for strategy formulation.
note.zh: 对五力模型进行重申和扩展的权威来源，用于战略制定。
